meta.description: Mobile-first PWA for small grocery store inventory management

backend.google_apis: googleapis v144 (Sheets v4, Drive v3, OAuth2)

tech_stack.image_storage: Google Drive (service account, public reader permissions)
tech_stack.auth_identity: Google OAuth 2.0 (openid email profile — identity only)
tech_stack.auth_data: Google Service Account (all Sheets + Drive API calls)

architecture_decisions.decision: Service account for Sheets/Drive, not user OAuth tokens
architecture_decisions.rationale: Avoids per-user token storage and refresh complexity. Manager shares Sheet/Drive folder with service account once during setup.
architecture_decisions.trade_off: Service account has access to all data regardless of which user is logged in — acceptable for single-store deployment.

architecture_decisions.rationale: Zero cost, familiar to non-technical store managers, built-in audit trail via version history.
architecture_decisions.trade_off: No transactions, no indexes, row-scan updates (read all → find row → update by index). Not suitable for high write volume.

architecture_decisions.rationale: Enables offline reads. Writes queue in writeQueue store and flush on reconnect.
architecture_decisions.trade_off: Frontend and Sheets can diverge during offline periods. Flush is last-write-wins.

architecture_decisions.decision: Consolidated Vercel functions (11 total, under 12-function Hobby limit)
architecture_decisions.rationale: Vercel Hobby plan caps at 12 serverless functions. Merged auth/login+callback+logout → api/auth/[action].ts; staff/invite+revoke → api/staff/index.ts (action param); items/create merged into api/inventory/index.ts POST.
architecture_decisions.trade_off: Some endpoints use body.action dispatch instead of distinct HTTP paths — slightly less RESTful.

architecture_decisions.decision: api/package.json overrides module type to commonjs
architecture_decisions.rationale: Root package.json has 'type: module' (Vite requirement). Vercel compiles API functions as CJS. Without the override, 'exports is not defined in ES module scope' crashes all functions.
architecture_decisions.trade_off: Must remember this file exists; mixing CJS and ESM in same repo is non-obvious.

architecture_decisions.rationale: node16 and nodenext require explicit .js extensions on relative imports. googleapis and other libraries don't follow that convention, causing TS2835 build errors on Vercel.
architecture_decisions.trade_off: Less strict module resolution — potential runtime issues if imports are ambiguous.

required.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
required.description: Google OAuth 2.0 client ID for identity login flow

required.name: GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI
required.description: Must match Authorized redirect URI in Google Cloud Console (e.g. https://shopstock-inky.vercel.app/api/auth/callback)

required.name: GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_EMAIL
required.description: Service account email — must have Editor access to the Google Sheet and Drive folder

required.name: GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_PRIVATE_KEY
required.description: PEM private key. Paste with literal \n sequences; code does .replace(/\\n/g, '\n')

required.name: GOOGLE_SHEETS_ID
required.description: The spreadsheet ID from the Google Sheet URL

required.name: GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID
required.description: Drive folder ID where item icons are uploaded (from folder URL)

entry_points.pwa_service_worker: auto-generated by vite-plugin-pwa at build time

api_endpoints.description: Redirects to Google OAuth consent URL. Passes invite token as state param.
Exchanges OAuth code for tokens, fetches userinfo, bootstraps manager if first login, validates invite token, sets iron-session cookie.
Destroys session cookie.
Returns {gmail, display_name, role} from session.
Returns full SyncSnapshot: {inventory[], categories[], config} for seeding IndexedDB.
Returns all inventory items from Sheets.
Creates new item: allocates item_id (increments Config!C2 last_item_seq), appends row to Inventory tab.
Returns single item by item_id.
Updates item fields. Row-scan: reads column A, finds row by item_id, updates that row.
Deletes item row from Sheets using batchUpdate deleteDimension.
Returns all categories sorted by sort_order.
Creates new category. Auto-generates CAT### ID and sort_order.
Updates category name.
Deletes category. Blocks deletion of 'Misc' category.
Returns all staff rows from Staff tab.
action=invite: generates UUID token, 48h expiry, appends placeholder row. action=revoke: sets status=revoked (blocks revoking manager).
Returns Config row (store_name, drive_folder_id, last_item_seq).
Updates store_name in Config tab.
Receives multipart icon upload. Checks Drive quota (skips for service accounts). Uploads to Drive, sets public reader permission, returns {url}.
Validates invite token and expiry. Updates staff row with real gmail, sets status=active, joined_at. Updates session role.

tabs.name: Categories
tabs.notes: Misc category seeded on first init, cannot be deleted

google_sheets_schema.update_pattern: Read full column A → findIndex(row => row[0] === id) → update at index+2 (1-based + header row)
google_sheets_schema.item_id_allocation: Read Config!C2 (last_item_seq) → increment → write back → zero-pad to 3 digits (e.g. 007)

pages.name: LoginPage
pages.description: Sign in with Google button. Stores invite token from ?invite= in sessionStorage before OAuth redirect. Shows error messages for: not_authorized, invite_expired, invite_invalid, oauth_failed.

pages.name: ItemsPage
pages.description: Main inventory list. Search + category filter (useMemo). Reads from IndexedDB via useInventory + useCategories. Auto-reloads after write queue flush via useWriteQueue.

pages.name: ItemDetailPage
pages.description: Shows single item from IndexedDB. Edit button (edit+ role), Delete button (full+ role) with confirm dialog.

pages.name: AddEditItemPage
pages.description: Loads existing item from IndexedDB for edit mode. Uploads icon via /api/upload/icon. Online: POST/PUT to API then putInventoryItem. Offline: queueWrite. friendlyUploadError() maps HTTP errors to human messages.

pages.name: SettingsPage
pages.description: Manager-only (redirects non-managers). Loads staff from /api/staff and config from /api/config. Inline store name edit. CategoryManager + StaffList + InviteModal.

layout.name: TopBar
layout.description: ShopStock brand + store name subtitle (from IndexedDB config) + AddButton + AvatarMenu

layout.name: BottomNav
layout.description: Items tab always visible. Settings tab visible only for manager role.

layout.name: OfflineBanner
layout.description: Amber banner shown when useOffline() returns true

hooks.name: useAuth
hooks.description: Fetches /api/me once on mount. Returns {user: SessionUser | null, loading, error}.

hooks.name: useOffline
hooks.description: Returns boolean. Tracks navigator.onLine + online/offline events.

hooks.name: useSync
hooks.description: Calls /api/sync/full then seeds IndexedDB stores: clearAndSeedInventory, clearAndSeedCategories, setConfig.

hooks.name: useInventory
hooks.description: Reads all inventory from IndexedDB. Exposes reload() for post-mutation refresh.

hooks.name: useCategories
hooks.description: Reads categories from IndexedDB. Sorts: Misc always last. Exposes reload().

hooks.name: useWriteQueue
hooks.description: Detects offline→online transition. Calls flushWriteQueue() then onFlushed callback (triggers inventory reload).

lib.name: db
lib.description: Singleton getDB() via idb v8. Exports typed CRUD helpers for all 4 IndexedDB stores.

lib.name: writeQueue
lib.description: queueWrite() enqueues to IndexedDB. flushWriteQueue() processes in enqueuedAt order, calls correct API endpoint per operation+resource.

lib.name: api
lib.description: apiFetch() wrapper: Content-Type application/json, credentials: include, throws Error on non-OK, parses JSON.

lib.name: imageCompress
lib.description: Canvas resize: max 200px longest edge, JPEG quality 0.7. Returns Blob.

lib.name: types
lib.description: Shared TypeScript interfaces used by both frontend and API functions.

api_lib_modules.name: session
api_lib_modules.description: iron-session config: cookie name shopstock-session, httpOnly, SameSite=Lax, secure in prod, 7-day maxAge. Exports getSession(), requireSession().

api_lib_modules.name: sheets
api_lib_modules.description: All Sheets CRUD for 4 tabs. GoogleAuth with service account credentials. initializeSheet() bootstraps tab structure on first manager login. allocateNextItemId() increments last_item_seq atomically (non-transactional).
api_lib_modules.known_issue: Row-scan updates are O(n) and non-atomic. Two concurrent writes could corrupt data.

api_lib_modules.name: drive
api_lib_modules.description: checkDriveQuota() — returns {usedFraction, blocked} (blocked if >90%). Wrapped in try/catch because service accounts have no personal quota. uploadIconToDrive() — creates file, sets public reader permission, returns direct view URL.

api_lib_modules.name: oauth
api_lib_modules.description: getOAuthClient() builds OAuth2Client from env vars. OAUTH_SCOPES = ['openid', 'email', 'profile'] — identity only, no data access.

api_lib_modules.name: roles
api_lib_modules.description: Role hierarchy: view(0) < edit(1) < full(2) < manager(3). hasRole() and requireRole() guard for each endpoint.

data_flows.name: Login
steps: User clicks Sign In → LoginPage stores invite token in sessionStorage
Redirect to /api/auth/login → generates Google consent URL (state=invite_token)
Google redirects to /api/auth/callback with code+state
Callback: exchanges code, fetches userinfo (gmail, display_name)
If invite state present: validates token, updates Staff row, activates user
If no Staff rows: bootstraps manager (initializeSheet + append manager row)
If existing staff: checks status=active, gets role
Sets iron-session cookie → redirects to /items

data_flows.name: Full Sync (on login)
steps: App.tsx detects authenticated user + online
useSync() calls GET /api/sync/full
API reads Inventory, Categories, Config tabs in parallel (Promise.all)
Returns SyncSnapshot
clearAndSeedInventory() replaces IndexedDB inventory store
clearAndSeedCategories() replaces IndexedDB categories store
setConfig() writes singleton config row

data_flows.name: Add Item (online)
steps: User fills ItemForm, optionally captures icon via camera
IconField compresses image: canvas resize to 200px, JPEG 0.7
POST /api/upload/icon (multipart) → Drive upload → returns {url}
POST /api/inventory with item fields + icon_url
API: allocateNextItemId, append row to Sheets
Response: {item: InventoryItem}
putInventoryItem() updates IndexedDB
Navigate to /items

data_flows.name: Add Item (offline)
steps: Icon upload is skipped (offline check in AddEditItemPage)
queueWrite('create', 'inventory', null, payload) enqueues to IndexedDB writeQueue
Navigate to /items (item not yet visible — no local item_id)
On reconnect: useWriteQueue detects online event
flushWriteQueue() processes entries in order → POST /api/inventory
onFlushed callback triggers useInventory reload

data_flows.name: Invite Flow
steps: Manager POSTs /api/staff {action: 'invite', role} → UUID token, 48h expiry, placeholder row in Sheets
Manager shares invite URL: /login?invite=TOKEN
Invitee opens URL → LoginPage stores token in sessionStorage
OAuth redirect passes token as state param
Callback receives state → POSTs to /api/join/[token] server-side
Token validated, Staff row updated with real gmail + status=active
Session set with correct role → redirected to /items

runtime_caching.reason: Reads come from IndexedDB; API calls must be real-time or fail

role_system.enforcement: requireRole() in api/_lib/roles.ts called at top of each API handler
frontend_guards: Settings tab hidden for non-manager role
Delete button on ItemDetailPage hidden for view/edit roles

known_issues.description: Row-scan updates are non-atomic. Concurrent PUT requests could read stale row indices and overwrite wrong rows. No locking mechanism.
known_issues.mitigation: Acceptable for single-store low-concurrency usage. Would need Firestore/Postgres for multi-user high-write scenarios.

known_issues.description: Items created offline have no local item_id — they don't appear in the IndexedDB inventory until the queue flushes online. User sees no optimistic feedback.
known_issues.mitigation: Could generate a temporary client-side UUID and reconcile on flush, but this adds complexity.

known_issues.description: allocateNextItemId() does read-then-write on Config!C2. Two simultaneous creates could get the same item_id.
known_issues.mitigation: Low risk for single-store. Fix would require Sheets conditional writes or a distributed counter.

known_issues.description: OAuth state param is user-visible in browser URL and logs. Token is single-use and 48h expiry, limiting risk.
known_issues.mitigation: Acceptable. Alternative: store token server-side tied to a nonce.

known_issues.description: Offline writes flush in timestamp order (last-write-wins). If two users edit the same item offline, one edit silently overwrites the other.
known_issues.mitigation: Acceptable for single-store. Add updated_at conflict detection for multi-user scenarios.

known_issues.area: Drive quota check skipped for service accounts
known_issues.description: checkDriveQuota() catches the quota API error (service accounts have no personal storage) and returns {blocked: false}. Drive storage could fill up silently.
known_issues.mitigation: Implement folder-size check via Drive files.list instead of about.get quota.

known_issues.description: initializeSheet() creates tabs and writes headers on first manager login. If called twice (e.g., network retry), could duplicate headers.
known_issues.mitigation: Add existence check before tab creation.

known_issues.description: idb database is version 1 with no upgrade path. Any schema change requires clearing the database or incrementing the version with manual migration logic.
known_issues.mitigation: Implement onupgradeneeded migration handlers before shipping version 2.

known_issues.area: Session not refreshed on role change
known_issues.description: If a manager changes a staff member's role in Sheets, that user's session cookie still carries the old role until they log out and back in.
known_issues.mitigation: Add role re-validation in requireSession() against Sheets on each request (adds latency).

constraints.misc_category: Cannot be deleted, always sorted last

config.tailwind.config.js: Tailwind v3, custom teal palette, content: src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}
config.tsconfig.app.json: Frontend TS config, baseUrl + paths for @/ alias, ignoreDeprecations 6.0
config.api/tsconfig.json: API TS config: module=commonjs, moduleResolution=node, includes api/**/*.ts + ../src/lib/types.ts
config.api/package.json: { type: commonjs } — overrides root ESM for Vercel function compilation

frontend_pages.src/pages/ItemsPage.tsx: Inventory list with search + category filter
frontend_pages.src/pages/ItemDetailPage.tsx: Single item view with role-gated actions
frontend_pages.src/pages/AddEditItemPage.tsx: Item create/edit form with icon upload

frontend_components.src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx: Header with brand + store name + actions
frontend_components.src/components/items/AddButton.tsx: FAB for adding items (hidden for view role)
frontend_components.src/components/items/ItemCard.tsx: List item card with icon fallback
frontend_components.src/components/items/ItemList.tsx: Virtualized item list with loading skeleton
Category CRUD (updates IndexedDB immediately on API success)

api_functions.api/auth/[action].ts: login + callback + logout (consolidated to save function slots)
api_functions.api/inventory/index.ts: GET all items + POST create (merged from items/create.ts)
api_functions.api/staff/index.ts: GET + POST invite/revoke (consolidated from staff/invite.ts + staff/revoke.ts)

api_lib.api/_lib/sheets.ts: Google Sheets CRUD for all 4 tabs
